breakingChangesNotes:
• The integration now uses OAuth2 authentication via CyberArk Identity instead of local EPM authentication. You must reconfigure the integration with the new authentication parameters: Identity URL, Client ID, Web App ID, and Client Secret.
  • The Application ID parameter has been deprecated and is no longer used.
  • In the cyberarkepm-activate-risk-plan and cyberarkepm-deactivate-risk-plan commands, the external_ip argument has been deprecated and replaced with logged_in_user. Update any playbooks or scripts that use these commands.
